hero.title: What I Can Do For You
hero.subtext: High-impact paid advertising campaigns backed by modern server-side analytics. No assumptions. Just clean, mathematical scale.

services.title: Paid Social Scaling (Meta & TikTok)
services.description: Systematic ad campaigns targeting high-intent cohorts on Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok using strict creative-testing frameworks.

services.title: Google Tag Manager Server-Side
services.description: Configure GTM custom node server containers to establish true first-party cookie domains and bypass modern ad-block filters.

services.title: Custom GA4 E-commerce Tracking
services.description: Establish a tailored Google Analytics 4 tracking schema to log every purchase, refund, cart value, and customer behavior route.

services.title: Meta Conversions API (CAPI)
services.description: Set up server-to-server tracking deduplicated perfectly with client-side pixels to optimize Meta's conversion delivery loops.

services.title: A/B Landing Page & CRO Testing
services.description: Audit and restructure e-commerce landing pages, checkouts, and offer layouts to instantly boost site conversions.

services.title: Creative Performance Auditing
services.description: Analyze existing visual libraries and provide comprehensive storyboards and hooks optimized specifically for direct acquisition.

services.title: Interactive Looker Studio BI BI Dashboards
services.description: Consolidate Meta, Google, Shopify, and Klaviyo data into one unified reporting dashboard for real-time marketing visibility.

services.title: Acquisition Funnel Auditing
services.description: Perform exhaustive structural diagnosis of your unit economics, acquisition costs, margins, and landing page bottlenecks.

services.title: E-commerce Email & Retention Setup
services.description: Integrate post-purchase upsells and abandoned cart flows to increase customer retention and lift average order value.

faq.question: What platforms do you manage?
faq.answer: We manage and scale campaigns across Meta (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok, and Google (Search, Shopping, and YouTube Ads). We align your cross-channel strategy so that Google captures the search intent triggered by your social video hooks.

faq.question: Why is Server-Side tracking necessary in 2026?
faq.answer: Browser-side pixel cookies are restricted by Safari's 1-7 day caps, ad blockers, and browser filters. Server-side tracking establishes first-party domains, bypassing browser firewalls to send purchase metrics directly server-to-server. This ensures 98%+ attribution, which feeds ad algorithms the accurate data they need to optimize targeting.

faq.question: How long does it take to see tangible results?
faq.answer: We generally begin with a 14-day discovery and audit phase where we configure clean pixel tracking and launch first-round creative hook tests. You will see directional lead/sales improvements in week 3-4, and we typically hit true sustainable scaling strides in months 2 and 3.

faq.question: Do you design the creative assets ourselves?
faq.answer: We do not film the raw video clips ourselves, but we do provide complete high-performance storyboards, script angles, and video briefs for your creative team. We then take your raw assets, edit them using performance-acquisition principles, and structure them for rigorous testing.

faq.question: How does the pricing and contract work?
faq.answer: We charge a flat monthly fee listed in our pricing tiers. There are no sneaky revenue-sharing or percent-of-ad-spend traps, ensuring our incentives align solely on your net profitability. Our plans are on a month-to-month basis with no locking multi-year contracts.
